name: I-Midazolam
description: I-benzodiazepine esebenza isikhathi esifushane eqala ngokushesha. Kuncanyelwa ukulaliswa ngokwenqubo, i-RSI pre-mediation, kanye nokuphathwa kokubanjwa kwe-IM/IN. Imizila ye-IM neye-intranasal inikeza inzuzo enkulu kuzilungiselelo zenkambu.
dose: I-sedation: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV titrated. Inqubo: 1-5 mg IV push slow. I-IM: 0.2 mg/kg. IN: 0.2 mg/kg (ubukhulu obungu-10 mg). Isimo se-Epilepticus IM: 10 mg IM (omdala).
contraindications: Ukudakwa kotshwala okunamandla okuhambisana nenhliziyo nemithambo yegazi
warnings: Ukudangala kokuphefumula -- qapha indlela yokuphefumula, ube ne-ejenti yokuhlehla (i-flumazenil) uma ikhona.
Umjovo osheshayo we-IV udala i-apnea -- phusha kancane.

pediatric.dose: I-sedation: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV. IM: 0.1-0.2 mg/kg. KU: 0.2-0.3 mg/kg. Ukubanjwa kwe-IM: 0.2 mg/kg (ubukhulu obungu-10 mg).
pediatric.note: Emzileni uwusizo ikakhulukazi ezinganeni -- ugwema ukufinyelela IV.

obstetric.note: Iwela i-placenta. I-sedation ye-neonatal ingenzeka. Sebenzisa umthamo omncane osebenzayo; qaphela ingane esanda kuzalwa uma inikezwa eduze nokubeletha.

source: JTS CPG / Standard Procedural Sedation Guidelines
